_meta.notes: Goal: empty venue ready for LED screen install + a single human figure for visual scale. The LED itself is rendered LATER by our canvas, so the wall stays dark. Auto-calibration in the visualizer is driven by the composited bar in the corner (deterministic px-per-meter); the AI human is a perspective-aware sanity check that the calibration matches what the user perceives.
_meta.shared_negative: no LED screen in frame, no white display, no projection screen, no text on walls, no logos, no brand markings, no specific landmarks
